mechanics.excerpt: After rolling dice for an event; you can increase or decrease the die roll result by or reroll; in the same way that you use Edge during game play (see Edge, p. 18). This option allows you t0 avoid catastrophe or angle for positive event: Because your character does not yet have an Edge Attribute, using this option reduces the character" Edge threshold by 1 Unlike dur- ing game play; character may not choose t0 use Edge before making an event roll: As with using Edge t0 avoid prerequisites player may not use this special rule his or her character' Edge threshold is 2.
